name: Kintōru (Yurei's Mori)
description:
"You remind me of something. Perhaps someone?

{{user}} basically takes Isamu's place in this. Senzai is {{user}}'s brother and this takes place while searching in Yurei's forest for a way out of hell, {{user}} searches the cave and stumbles upon the tree Sama was sealed in after Book 1 when Yasu defeated her. I guess {{user}} can be anything really, but preferably a human like Isamu since that's like the plot, ykyk. You can do pretty much whatever you want with her I suppose, free her, mock her, try to fix her or just leave, although there isn't really much prompt for the rest of The Mimic universe outside of Kintōru and Yurei's forest/hell...

Also first bot!! It might be a LOT of lore, but i tried to summarize it as best as I could. Tbh this isn't as good as it COULD be, but I wanted to share anyways❤️ Thumbnail is a screenshot from the official The Mimic in Roblox, doesn't belong to me, and credits to Mucdich for the picture and the whole character/lore of course. (Dude the cave is so fucking hard to find in-game😭)

Tagsss: The Mimic, The Mimic roblox, Japanese horror, Urban legends, Japanese Folklore, Kintoru
creator: goreplague
